query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Overlord', 'A ruler of other rulers', 'Her overlord became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Overpass', 'A road, pedestrian walkway, etc, crossing over some barrier', 'Scholars noted a striking overpass between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Overproduction', 'Production of more of a commodity than can be used or sold', 'Scholars noted a striking overproduction between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Overreach', 'To reach above or beyond in any direction', 'Critics argued that the plan might overreach the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Overrun', 'To defeat an enemy and invade in great numbers', 'Over time, the community learned to overrun its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Oversee', 'To supervise, guide, or direct actions of a person or group', 'Over time, the community learned to oversee its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Overseer', 'One who oversees or supervises, a supervisor', 'Her overseer became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Overshadow', 'To dominate something and make it seem insignificant', 'The author hoped the new policy would overshadow tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Overstride', 'To surpass', 'Critics argued that the plan might overstride the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Overt', 'Open and not secret nor concealed', 'The passage presents a overt portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Overthrow', 'To bring about the downfall of a government, etc', 'Over time, the community learned to overthrow its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Overtone', 'An implicit meaning, as opposed to a hidden meaning', 'Critics argued that the plan might overtone the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Overture', 'An approach made to establish a relationship', 'Critics argued that the plan might overture the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Overween', 'Unduly confident, arrogant, presumptuous, conceited', 'The essay highlights the overween of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Overweight', 'Weighing too much or more than is considered normal', 'Scholars noted a striking overweight between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Overwrought', 'In a state of excessive nervousness, excitement, or anger', 'Her overwrought became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Pacific', 'Soothing', 'The essay highlights the pacific of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Pacifist', 'One who support sor favours peace', 'Her pacifist became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Pacify', 'To quell the anger or agitation of', 'Critics argued that the plan might pacify the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Pact', 'An agreement, a compact, a covenant', 'Her pact became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Paean', 'Any loud and joyous song, a song of triumph', 'Scholars noted a striking paean between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Pagan', 'Person or community observing a polytheistic religion', 'Scholars noted a striking pagan between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Pageant', 'An elaborate public display, i.e. a parade in costume', 'Her pageant became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Painstak', 'Carefully attentive to details, diligent in a procedure', 'The author hoped the new policy would painstak tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Palatable', '(of food or drink) Pleasant to taste; (of an action or proposal) Acceptable or satisfactory', 'Over time, the community learned to palatable its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Palate', 'The sense of taste', 'The essay highlights the palate of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Palatial', 'Of or relating to a palace', 'The author hoped the new policy would palatial tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Paleontology', 'Study of life in prehistoric times, represented by fossils', 'Scholars noted a striking paleontology between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Palette', 'A range of colors or qualities', 'Scholars noted a striking palette between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Palimpsest', 'A document or object that has been reused or altered but still retains traces of its original form', '“The ancient manuscript was a palimpsest, with faint traces of earlier writings.”', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Palinode', 'Poem where an author retracts something from an earlier poem', 'Scholars noted a striking palinode between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Palisade', 'A fence of stakes set firmly in the ground, for enclosure', 'The essay highlights the palisade of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Pall', 'A cloth for spreading over a coffin', 'The essay highlights the pall of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Palliate', 'To lessen the severity without curing', 'The author hoped the new policy would palliate tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Palliative', 'Minimising progression of a disease for as long as possible', 'What seemed palliative at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Pallid', 'Lacking color', 'The essay highlights the pallid of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Pallor', 'Unusual paleness', 'Scholars noted a striking pallor between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Palpable', 'Perceptible by touch or easily sensed; obvious and tangible', 'What seemed palpable at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Palpitate', 'To throb, beat strongly', 'Over time, the community learned to palpitate its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Palsy', 'Any atonal muscular condition characterised by tremors', 'Scholars noted a striking palsy between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Paltry', 'Ridiculously or insultingly small', 'The essay highlights the paltry of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Paludal', 'Of or pertaining to marshes', 'Scholars noted a striking paludal between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Pamphlet', 'A small booklet of printed informational matter', 'Her pamphlet became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Pamphleteer', 'A writer or publisher of pamphlets', 'The essay highlights the pamphleteer of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Pan-american', 'Of all the countries of north, central and south america', 'The essay highlights the pan-american of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Panacea', 'A solution for all problems or difficulties', 'The essay highlights the panacea of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Panache', 'A grand or flamboyant manner', 'Her panache became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Pandemic', 'Disease prevalent in a country, continent, or the world', 'Her pandemic became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Pandemonium', 'Wild uproar or unrestrained disorder', 'Her pandemonium became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Pander', 'To cater to or profit from the weaknesses of others', 'The author hoped the new policy would pander tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
